description: Master50 — independent validation set (Amazon, Google, Deloitte, Pfizer, Boeing, Nike, Tesla, Accenture, Reliance Jio, ICICI). No overlap with Judge50.

cases.title: AWS EC2 Instance Unreachable in us-east-1
cases.description: Production EC2 fleet in us-east-1 AZ-1b not responding to SSH or health checks after subnet route table change. PagerDuty firing for checkout API.

cases.title: Internal Seller Portal 500 on Inventory Upload
cases.description: Amazon Seller Central internal inventory CSV upload returns HTTP 500 for all sellers in EU marketplace. Application logs show NullPointerException in listing service.

cases.title: RDS Postgres Failover Loop on Payments DB
cases.description: RDS Aurora Postgres payments-primary cluster stuck in failover loop. Connection pool exhausted on order service. Replication lag climbing.

cases.title: S3 Bucket Policy Exposed Customer PII
cases.description: Security incident: public-read ACL detected on S3 bucket cust-analytics-raw containing unmasked customer emails. GuardDuty high-severity finding.

cases.title: New Warehouse Associate AD Account Creation
cases.description: Need AD account and badge access for 40 new fulfillment associates starting Monday at BLR7. HR spreadsheet attached with employee IDs.

cases.title: BigQuery Scheduled Query Failing on Permissions
cases.description: BigQuery scheduled query marketing-daily-rollup fails with permission denied on dataset analytics_prod. Worked yesterday after IAM role change.

cases.title: Chromebook Enrollment Stuck at Enterprise Sign-In
cases.description: Chromebook fleet enrollment hangs at enterprise.google.com sign-in for Mumbai sales team. Intune shows pending compliance.

cases.title: Gmail Phishing Campaign Targeting Executives
cases.description: Security incident: CFO received spear phishing with fake DocuSign link. Two VPs clicked link. Need immediate mailbox quarantine review.

cases.title: Cloud Load Balancer 502 on Internal Tools
cases.description: GCP HTTPS load balancer returns 502 Bad Gateway for internal-tools.corp.google.com. Backend NEG shows unhealthy instances.

cases.title: Google Drive Shared Drive Quota Exceeded
cases.description: Team shared drive ENG-DESIGN hit 500GB quota. Cannot save Figma exports. Need quota increase or archival policy.

cases.title: SAP Fiori Tile Blank After Upgrade
cases.description: SAP Fiori launchpad shows blank tiles for expense approval app after weekend kernel patch. Other Fiori apps load fine.

cases.title: VPN GlobalProtect Disconnects on Client WiFi
cases.description: GlobalProtect VPN drops every 8 minutes on hotel WiFi during client site visit. Error GP-1001. Need stable tunnel for audit workpapers.

cases.title: Consultant Laptop BSOD After Docking Station Update
cases.description: Dell laptop blue screens with stop code DRIVER_IRQL after USB-C dock firmware update. Cannot join client workshop.

cases.title: SharePoint Audit Library Access Denied
cases.description: Cannot upload working papers to SharePoint document library AUDIT-2026 — access denied despite contributor group membership.

cases.title: Okta MFA Reset for Partner Portal
cases.description: Partner portal Okta MFA device lost. Need MFA reset and temporary bypass for tax partner before filing deadline tonight.

cases.title: LIMS Sample Results Not Syncing to SAP
cases.description: Lab LIMS overnight sync job to SAP QM module failed. 2,400 sample results pending for batch release approval.

cases.title: Oracle Clinical DB Deadlock on Trial Data
cases.description: Oracle clinical trials DB showing recurring deadlocks on patient enrollment table. CRAs cannot enter visit data.

cases.title: Ransomware Alert on R&D File Server
cases.description: Security incident: CrowdStrike detected ransomware encryption on RND-FILE-03. Multiple .locked extensions on research shares.

cases.title: Cold Storage Backup Chain Broken
cases.description: Veeam backup job for GxP cold storage vol_PHARMA_RAW failed — backup chain broken, snapshot repository full.

cases.title: Lab Printer Label Alignment Wrong
cases.description: Zebra label printer in formulation lab prints barcode labels misaligned by 3mm. Scanners reject vials on line 4.

cases.title: CATIA License Server Checkout Failure
cases.description: CATIA V6 license server refuses checkout for wing design team. LMSTAT shows all licenses in use but designers are logged off.

cases.title: Factory Floor WiFi Multicast Storm
cases.description: 802.1x WiFi on Everett factory floor experiencing multicast storm. PLC tablets losing connection to assembly line SCADA.

cases.title: Wind Tunnel Sensor Data Import Timeout
cases.description: CSV import script for wind tunnel sensor telemetry times out after 90 minutes. Oracle staging table load incomplete.

cases.title: Unauthorized USB Device on Engineering VLAN
cases.description: Security incident: NAC quarantined unauthorized USB storage device on engineering VLAN 42. User attempted copy of ITAR drawings.

cases.title: Boeing VPN Certificate Expiry Warning
cases.description: Corp VPN SSL certificate expires in 48 hours. Need renewal and push to F5 APM profiles before global supplier access breaks.

cases.title: SAP Retail POS Sync Stopped
cases.description: SAP CAR POS inbound queue stopped processing for APAC stores. Stores selling blind without inventory visibility.

cases.title: Distribution Center NAS Mount Stale Handle
cases.description: NetApp NFS mount to DC-PORTLAND shows stale file handle. WMS cannot write pick confirmations.

cases.title: Marketing MacBook Not Charging
cases.description: MacBook Pro charger LED flickers orange, battery stuck at 4%. Need replacement adapter before Milan fashion week presentation.

cases.title: Contractor Salesforce Access for Campaign
cases.description: External agency contractor needs Salesforce Marketing Cloud read access for Q3 campaign assets. NDA signed.

cases.title: E-Commerce Site DDoS Traffic Spike
cases.description: Akamai WAF alerting on DDoS traffic spike against nike.com checkout. Origin latency elevated, 504 errors on payment step.

cases.title: MES Production Line HMI Frozen
cases.description: Manufacturing execution HMI on Gigafactory line 3 frozen on login screen. Operators cannot log production counts.

cases.title: Redis Cache Cluster Sentinel Failover
cases.description: Redis Sentinel failover loop on vehicle telemetry cache cluster. API gateway seeing connection pool exhausted errors.

cases.title: Factory Robot Controller Network Latency
cases.description: Packet loss between PLC robot controllers and central SCADA on VLAN 200. Welding robots pausing intermittently.

cases.title: Docker Hypervisor Blocked by HVCI Policy
cases.description: Docker Desktop cannot start — Hypervisor blocked by HVCI security policy on engineering laptop after Windows update.

cases.title: GitHub Secret Leaked in CI Log
cases.description: Security incident: GitHub Actions pipeline log printed AWS secret access key in plain text. Key needs immediate rotation.

cases.title: Client Power BI Gateway Offline
cases.description: On-prem Power BI data gateway ACC-CLIENT-01 offline. All client dashboards show refresh failed since 6 AM IST.

cases.title: MongoDB Atlas Connection Pool Exhausted
cases.description: MongoDB Atlas cluster for client loyalty app showing connection pool exhausted. Mobile app users see 503 errors.

cases.title: Zscaler Blocking Client VPN Split Tunnel
cases.description: Zscaler policy update blocks split tunnel to client AWS VPC. Developers cannot reach client bastion host.

cases.title: Workday Time Entry SSO Failure
cases.description: Workday time entry SSO fails with SAML assertion invalid signature. Affects 3,000 consultants on payroll cutoff day.

cases.title: Tableau Extract Refresh Failed
cases.description: Tableau Server extract refresh for client profitability dashboard failed overnight. Hyper file corrupt error in logs.

cases.title: BSS Billing Rating Engine Crash
cases.description: BSS rating engine JVM OOM crash during peak recharge hour. Prepaid activations failing across Maharashtra circle.

cases.title: 5G Core DNS Resolution Failure
cases.description: DNS resolution failure on 5G core signaling nodes. Subscriber attach success rate dropped 18% in Gujarat.

cases.title: Tower Site Router BGP Session Down
cases.description: BGP session down on MPLS PE router at tower site JIO-NAG-441. Backhaul traffic rerouting causing latency spikes.

cases.title: MyJio App Login OTP Not Delivered
cases.description: MyJio app login OTP SMS not delivered for 12,000 users since SMS gateway upgrade. Need access management and telco vendor check.

cases.title: Customer CDR Database Replication Lag
cases.description: PostgreSQL CDR replica lag exceeded 45 minutes on analytics cluster. Fraud detection batch jobs delayed.

cases.title: Core Banking API Latency Spike
cases.description: Finacle core banking API latency p99 above 8 seconds on fund transfer endpoint. Mobile banking timeouts reported.

cases.title: ATM Switch Network Packet Loss
cases.description: MPLS WAN packet loss between DC and ATM switch causing transaction reversals in Pune region.

cases.title: SQL Server Always On Failover Stuck
cases.description: SQL Server Always On availability group failover stuck in progress for 30 minutes. Loan origination DB read-only.

cases.title: Phishing Email Impersonating CFO
cases.description: Security incident: branch managers received phishing email impersonating CFO requesting urgent wire transfer approval.

cases.title: Branch Manager iPad Intune Compliance Block
cases.description: Branch manager iPad blocked by Intune compliance policy — jailbreak detection false positive. Cannot access CRM app.
